annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under MCL §600.6013 (Michigan’s judgment interest runs from the filing of the complaint): the general rate is 1 percentage point above the six-month average of 5-year U.S. Treasury note auctions, certified by the State Treasurer and reset each January 1 and July 1, COMPOUNDED ANNUALLY — currently 4.725% (period beginning Jan 1, 2026). Judgments on a written instrument use a separate rate (the instrument’s rate, capped at 13%). Verify the current period at legislature.mi.gov; not legal advice.
